title: Page Agent Local Lab
description: Local interoperability experiment with Alibaba Page Agent — real non-demo IIFE runtime driven by a deterministic offline mock model

integration.bundle_status: Vendored non-demo IIFE bundle built from pinned upstream source (packages/page-agent/src/production-iife-entry.ts). The bundle exposes window.PageAgent and runs the real Panel, PageAgentCore, PageController, and LLM client with a local deterministic mock model. The published demo bundle (auto-init, free testing API, CDN) is excluded per experiment policy.
